name: write_abstract_shell
short_description: Write an abstract shell checkpoint of the current design
full_help:
write_abstract_shell

Description: 
Write an abstract shell checkpoint of the current design

Syntax: 
write_abstract_shell  -cell <arg> [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
The name of the checkpoint file

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -cell       Create an abstract shell for this reconfigurable cell
  [-force]    Overwrite existing checkpoint file
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      Design checkpoint file
              Values: A filename with alphanumeric characters and .dcp 
              extension.

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Create an abstract shell for this reconfigurable cell
Suspend message limits during command execution
